Resume

About

About Me

Full Stack Engineer with 3+ years shipping production SaaS and CRM platforms. I specialise in backend architecture — REST APIs, multi-tenant systems, authentication flows, and real-time features. I own features end-to-end, from database design to the React UI.

Experience

3+ Years

Role

Full Stack Engineer

Location

Trivandrum, Kerala, India

Experience

Work History

01

Enfin Technologies

Software Engineer · Trivandrum

2024 — Present

Building backend-heavy SaaS and CRM modules for enterprise clients, including a multi-tenant ticketing and asset management platform.

  • Architected a multi-tenant ticketing platform with organisation-scoped data access and RBAC — supporting concurrent enterprise clients without data leakage.
  • Implemented JWT, LDAP/Active Directory, and Google OAuth authentication flows with secure token handling, reducing auth-related support tickets.
  • Integrated Redis and Bull-based queue processing for async email, SMS, and in-app notification delivery, decoupling notification load from the main API.
  • Built real-time notification features using Socket.IO and WebSockets, enabling live status updates across the platform.
02

BairuhaTech

Full Stack Developer · Calicut

2023 — 2024

Delivered 6+ web and mobile applications across booking, CRM, and commerce domains using React, React Native, NestJS, and PostgreSQL.

  • Delivered 6+ production web and mobile apps end-to-end, covering frontend, backend APIs, and database workflows.
  • Designed backend services following clean architecture principles, reducing defect rework and improving maintainability across projects.
  • Integrated Firebase Authentication and OTP-based login systems for mobile-first applications.
  • Optimised PostgreSQL and Oracle queries, improving query execution performance and API response efficiency.
03

CMS IT Services Pvt Ltd

IT Support Engineer · Cochin

2020 — 2021

Provided L2 application and infrastructure support for enterprise environments serving 100+ daily users.

  • Supported 100+ daily users across application, network, and server incidents while maintaining high SLA compliance.
  • Resolved system and infrastructure issues in enterprise environments, building a strong foundation in production operations.
